name: OnTcpClose
title: OnTcpClose
syntax: void OnTcpClose( dword socket, long result);
description: If the CAPL program implements this callback it is called when a TCP socket receives a close notification, when the remote station terminates the connection with TcpClose or TcpShutdown.
To release the resources of the socket, TcpClose must be called.

parameters.name: socket
parameters.description: The socket handle or socket object.

parameters.name: result
parameters.description: The specific result code of the operation. If the operation completed successfully the value is 0. Otherwise the value is an error code.Typical errors are interrupt of the connection, timeout or reset.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
